system.description:
This Career represents the small businessman, the market vendor, the shopkeeper or the traveling salesman. It could also represent a stake holder in a major joint-stock company. The character can haggle for goods at reduced prices and is skilled at getting the best prices for goods he’s bought. He can readily appraise items for their worth, can get hold of unusual and exotic goods and is good with figures.

A high Savvy score is very important and a good Flair is also helpful.

Suggested Boons: Great Wealth, Silver Tongue, Ship, Friends in High Places, Friends in Low Places, Membership (Powerful Group)

Suggested Flaws: Arrogant, Greed, Incompetent Servant, Non-Combatant, City Dweller
